notes.mitsubishi_silver_sell: Mitsubishi Materials retail sell price (savings scheme reference). Not a buyback rate. Excluded from RS mean.
notes.mercari_mspi_b: MSPI-B: mean of 6 sold 1oz .999 silver bullion listings on Mercari (Libertad 2002, Vienna Phil 2025, Britannia 2020, Walking Liberty 2025, Panda 2023, Britannia 2021). Raw prices: 21500, 21199, 22000, 22800, 21000, 21800 JPY. Divided by 31.1035g/oz.
